subcodes.first_line: O Lord, Thou Forgiver of sins, Remover of difficulties, and Concealer of faults! I spread before Thee these hands of supplication [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا غافر الذنوب و کاشف الکروب و ساتر العیوب انی ابسط الیک اکف الضراعه و
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @prayer for the departed, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @generosity [kirama]
